title: Project Case Studies - Production Focus Highlights
content:
Case Study 1 - Batcave AI Platform:
Problem: Need a private, scalable, always-on AI environment for inference, retrieval, automation, and monitoring.
Execution: Built and operated a 56-container hybrid-cloud stack with multi-database architecture, local LLM inference, and observability tooling.
Outcome: 36+ services running over 177GB of production data with reliability and operational visibility emphasis.

Case Study 2 - Enterprise NLP and Document Intelligence:
Problem: High manual effort and slow review workflows in legal/compliance-oriented text processing.
Execution: Delivered production NLP pipelines for extraction, semantic search, and classification over large-scale records.
Outcome: Approximately 35% reduction in manual review effort and measurable SLA-aligned throughput gains.

Case Study 3 - Production ML Platform Optimization:
Problem: Inference latency and cloud costs constrained scale and responsiveness.
Execution: Built MLOps-enabled pipelines and optimized inference architecture with event-driven cloud services and model-serving improvements.
Outcome: Latency dropped from ~450ms to <90ms in key paths; p99 improved and infrastructure cost reduced in production settings.
